name: Bobby McFerrin
abstract: Robert Keith McFerrin Jr. (born March 11, 1950) is an American improvisational vocal musician, singer, songwriter, and conductor.

about_quotes.speaker: Derek Brown
about_quotes.evidence: But some of the people I was listening to like the Eddie Harris’s with the jumping around of the octaves, and then the big one for me, Bobby McFerrin, of course not a sax player, a vocalist. about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: We just finished a tour recently... we did Mozart together. He conducted the St. Paul Chamber Orchestra and we conducted two Mozart piano concerti.
